hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Meeting a new colleague at the office -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself at Work -- Your First Day on the Team
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself at Work

listenings.text: Hi Danilo, and welcome to the company! My name is Sofia, from the people team. I am very happy to have you here. Let me tell you a few things about your first day. Your desk is on the third floor, next to the data team. Your manager is called Marcus, and he is very friendly. We start work at nine o'clock, and we have lunch at noon. On Monday mornings, the whole team meets for thirty minutes. If you have any questions, just ask. Everyone here is happy to help. Have a great first day!
